### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>onsi/ginkgo (github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.19.1`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases/tag/v2.19.1)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.19.0...v2.19.1)

#### 2.19.1

##### Fixes

-   update supported platforms for race conditions \[[`63c8c30`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/63c8c30)]
-   \[build] Allow custom name for binaries. \[[`ff41e27`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/ff41e27)]

##### Maintenance

-   bump gomega \[[`76f4e0c`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/76f4e0c)]
-   Bump rexml from 3.2.6 to 3.2.8 in /docs ([#​1417](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1417)) \[[`b69c00d`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/b69c00d)]
-   Bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.20.0 to 0.21.0 ([#​1425](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1425)) \[[`f097741`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/f097741)]

</details>
